_publications._publicationTitle: DINs: Deep Interactive Networks for Neurofibroma Segmentation in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 on Whole-Body MRI.

_contextSnippet: Experiments on the training set and the test set show that the proposed method outperforms conventional interactive methods and performs significantly better than automated and interactive CNN-based methods.
details: Outperforms conventional interactive methods and performs significantly better than automated and interactive CNN-based methods
